languages.original_text: "I wish to thank you. You helped me cope with a situation that was beyond my control and to recognise my mistakes, and that is worth a great deal. I was considering using this implant in an experiment, but I thought it too valuable to waste on the laity. Please accept it as a gift." {n}The Manipulus bows, presenting you with a package.{/n}

languages.text: "Я хочу отблагодарить вас, коллега. Вы помогли мне совладать с вышедшей из под контроля ситуацией и осознать свои ошибки — это дорогого стоит. Я думал использовать данный имплант в ходе эксперимента, но счел его слишком ценным, чтобы тратить на мирян. Прошу, примите его в дар". {n}Манипулус кланяется, преподнося вам сверток.{/n}

"I wish to thank you. You helped me cope with a situation that was beyond my control and to recognise my mistakes, and that is worth a great deal. I was considering using this implant in an experiment, but I thought it too valuable to waste on the laity. Please accept it as a gift." {n}The Manipulus bows, presenting you with a package.{/n}

I was considering using this implant in an experiment, but I thought it too valuable to waste on the laity. Please accept it as a gift." {n}The Manipulus bows, presenting you with a package.{/n}

languages.text: 「感謝の意を表します。あなたが助けてくれたおかげで、コントロールできない状況に立ち向かうことができ、自分の過ちを認識することができました。それはとても大きな価値があります。このインプラントを実験に使うことを考えていましたが、一般の人に使ってはもったいないと思いました。贈り物として受け取ってください」{n}マニピュラスが頭を下げ、あなたに包み物を渡す.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I wish to thank you. You helped me cope with a situation that was beyond my control and to recognise my mistakes, and that is worth a great deal. I was considering using this implant in an experiment, but I thought it too valuable to waste on the laity. Please accept it as a gift." {n}The Manipulus bows, presenting you with a package.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「感謝の意を表します。あなたが助けてくれたおかげで、コントロールできない状況に立ち向かうことができ、自分の過ちを認識することができました。それはとても大きな価値があります。このインプラントを実験に使うことを考えていましたが、一般の人に使ってはもったいないと思いました。贈り物として受け取ってください。」{n}マニピュラスが頭を下げ、あなたに包み物を渡す.{/n}

languages.text: “我要感谢您。您帮我处理了一个超出我掌控范围的局面，让我认识到了自身的谬误，这非常有价值。我本打算将这件植入物用于实验，但用在教外人身上实在浪费。还请收下这份礼物。”{n}操纵者鞠了一躬，递给你一个包裹。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I wish to thank you. You helped me cope with a situation that was beyond my control and to recognise my mistakes, and that is worth a great deal. I was considering using this implant in an experiment, but I thought it too valuable to waste on the laity. Please accept it as a gift." {n}The Manipulus bows, presenting you with a package.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我要感谢您。您帮我处理了一个超出我掌控范围的局面，让我认识到了自身的谬误，这非常有价值。我本打算将这件植入物用于实验，但用在教外人身上实在浪费。还请收下这份礼物。”{n}操纵者鞠了一躬，递给你一个包裹。{/n}

languages.text: « Je tiens à vous remercier. Vous m'avez apporté une aide inestimable en me permettant de surmonter une situation qui échappait à mon contrôle et de reconnaître mes erreurs. J'envisageais d'utiliser cet implant dans une expérience, mais je me suis dit qu'il était trop précieux pour le gâcher sur des profanes. Veuillez l'accepter en gage de ma gratitude. » {n}Le manipulus s'incline en vous tendant un paquet.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I wish to thank you. You helped me cope with a situation that was beyond my control and to recognise my mistakes, and that is worth a great deal. I was considering using this implant in an experiment, but I thought it too valuable to waste on the laity. Please accept it as a gift." {n}The Manipulus bows, presenting you with a package.{/n}

J'envisageais d'utiliser cet implant dans une expérience, mais je me suis dit qu'il était trop précieux pour le gâcher sur des profanes. Veuillez l'accepter en gage de ma gratitude. » {n}Le manipulus s'incline en vous tendant un paquet.{/n}

languages.text: «Quiero darle las gracias. Me ha ayudado a lidiar con una situación que escapaba a mi control y a reconocer mis errores, y eso es algo muy importante. Pensaba utilizar este implante en un experimento, pero es demasiado valioso como para desperdiciarlo con los laicos. Acéptelo como regalo». {n}El manipulus te hace una reverencia y te ofrece un paquete.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I wish to thank you. You helped me cope with a situation that was beyond my control and to recognise my mistakes, and that is worth a great deal. I was considering using this implant in an experiment, but I thought it too valuable to waste on the laity. Please accept it as a gift." {n}The Manipulus bows, presenting you with a package.{/n}

Pensaba utilizar este implante en un experimento, pero es demasiado valioso como para desperdiciarlo con los laicos. Acéptelo como regalo». {n}El manipulus te hace una reverencia y te ofrece un paquete.{/n}

languages.text: "Size teşekkür etmek istiyorum. Kontrolümde olmayan bir durumla başa çıkmama ve hatalarımı fark etmeme yardımcı oldunuz. Bu çok kıymetli. Bu implantı bir deneyde kullanmayı düşünüyordum ama avama harcanmayacak kadar değerli olduğunu düşünüyorum. Lütfen bunu hediye olarak kabul buyurun." {n}Manipulus, eğilip sana bir paket uzatıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I wish to thank you. You helped me cope with a situation that was beyond my control and to recognise my mistakes, and that is worth a great deal. I was considering using this implant in an experiment, but I thought it too valuable to waste on the laity. Please accept it as a gift." {n}The Manipulus bows, presenting you with a package.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Size teşekkür etmek istiyorum. Kontrolümde olmayan bir durumla başa çıkmama ve hatalarımı fark etmeme yardımcı oldunuz. Bu çok kıymetli. Bu implantı bir deneyde kullanmayı düşünüyordum ama avama harcanmayacak kadar değerli olduğunu düşünüyorum. Lütfen bunu hediye olarak kabul buyurun." {n}Manipulus, eğilip sana bir paket uzatıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich möchte Euch danken. Ihr habt mir geholfen, eine Situation zu meistern, die außerhalb meiner Kontrolle war, und mir meine Fehler aufgezeigt. Das ist sehr viel wert. Ich hatte vor, dieses Implantat bei einem Experiment einzusetzen, hielt es aber für zu wertvoll, um es an Laien zu verschwenden. Bitte nehmt es daher als Geschenk an." {n}Der Manipulus verneigt sich und reicht dir ein Paket.{/n}
